text: Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler automatically scales the number of pods based on CPU or custom metrics.
Vertical Pod Autoscaler adjusts CPU and memory requests for pods to improve resource utilization.
Cluster Autoscaler adds or removes nodes from a Kubernetes cluster based on pending pods.
Helm is a package manager for Kubernetes that simplifies application deployment using charts.
Prometheus scrapes metrics from applications and stores them as time series data.
Grafana visualizes metrics from Prometheus using dashboards and alerts.
ServiceMonitor is a Kubernetes custom resource used by Prometheus Operator to discover scrape targets.
Horizontal scaling improves throughput by adding more replicas of a service.
Vertical scaling increases the resources allocated to a single instance.
Load balancers distribute incoming network traffic across multiple backend services.
Vector search uses embeddings to find semantically similar documents instead of exact keyword matches.
Embeddings are numerical representations of text that capture semantic meaning.
FAISS is a library for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors.
Approximate Nearest Neighbor algorithms trade accuracy for faster search performance.
Cosine similarity measures the angle between two vectors to estimate semantic similarity.
HNSW is a graph-based index structure commonly used for vector similarity search.
Hybrid search combines keyword-based ranking with vector-based semantic similarity.
Metadata filtering restricts vector search results using structured fields like tenant or language.
Re-ranking uses a more expensive model to improve the final ordering of search results.
Embedding models are often trained on large text corpora to capture general language semantics.
OpenSearch provides k-NN search capabilities using vector fields and ANN algorithms.
Elasticsearch can perform approximate nearest neighbor searches using dense vector fields.
Pinecone is a managed vector database optimized for large-scale similarity search.
Weaviate supports vector search with schema-based metadata and hybrid queries.
Milvus is an open-source vector database designed for high-performance similarity search.
REST APIs expose application functionality over HTTP using standard verbs like GET and POST.
FastAPI is a Python web framework optimized for building high-performance APIs.
Uvicorn is an ASGI server commonly used to run FastAPI applications.
Python virtual environments isolate project dependencies from the system Python.
Docker containers package applications with their runtime dependencies.
Continuous Integration pipelines automatically test and build code on every commit.
Continuous Deployment automates the release of applications into production environments.
Blue-green deployments reduce downtime by switching traffic between two identical environments.
Canary deployments gradually roll out new versions to a subset of users.
Infrastructure as Code enables reproducible infrastructure using declarative configuration files.
AWS provides managed services for compute, storage, networking, and machine learning.
Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service that runs control planes in AWS.
IAM controls access to cloud resources using roles and policies.
CloudWatch collects logs and metrics from AWS services.
S3 is an object storage service designed for high durability and scalability.
